inputs.label: Kayak Speed
inputs.businessContext: The speed of the kayak relative to water.

businessContext_i18n.en: The speed of the kayak relative to water.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Geschwindigkeit des Kajaks relativ zum Wasser.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La vitesse du kayak par rapport à l'eau.
businessContext_i18n.es: La velocidad del kayak relativa al agua.

inputs.label: Drag Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Typical drag coefficient for the kayak hull shape.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical drag coefficient for the kayak hull shape.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kano gövde şekli için tipik sürükleme katsayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de traînée typique pour la forme de la coque du kayak.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de arrastre típico para la forma del casco del kayak.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل السحب النموذجي لشكل هيكل الكاياك.

inputs.label: Cross-sectional Area
inputs.businessContext: Frontal area of the kayak and paddler.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frontal area of the kayak and paddler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stirnfläche des Kajaks und des Paddlers.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface frontale du kayak et du pagayeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área frontal del kayak y del remero.

inputs.label: Water Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of water (fresh water ~1000, salt water ~1025).

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of water (fresh water ~1000, salt water ~1025).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité de l'eau (eau douce ~1000, eau salée ~1025).
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del agua (agua dulce ~1000, agua salada ~1025).

inputs.label: Paddling Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Mechanical efficiency of converting human power to propulsion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mechanical efficiency of converting human power to propulsion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İnsan gücünü itişe dönüştüren mekanik verimlilik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mechanischer Wirkungsgrad der Umwandlung von menschlicher Kraft in Vortrieb.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement mécanique de la conversion de la puissance humaine en propulsion.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia mecánica de convertir la potencia humana en propulsión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكفاءة الميكانيكية لتحويل القدرة البشرية إلى دفع.
